name: Texas Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a casserole dish and preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Brown the hamburger, celery, onion, and green bell pepper together in the casserole dish until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Spread the egg noodles evenly over the top of the hamburger mixture.
4. Pour the tomato sauce over the egg noodles.
5. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese on top.
6. Bake for one hour at 350 degrees, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
